_description: Known offsets and addresses for Mirror's Edge builds.  Mirrors MirrorsEdgeTweaks' Offsets/Offsets_*.json pattern.  Used when pattern scanning fails (fallback).

render_target_fix.description: JNE -> JMP to fix render target sizing (MET ExePatcher).

GNames.note: Most builds: call pattern near GObjects

_how_to_extend.add_known_offset: Add an entry under the target build with offset + description (line number is ordinal reference).
_how_to_extend.add_pattern_fallback: When pattern scanning fails on a known-good build, record the correct address here so future detection can fall back.
_how_to_extend.verify_before_commit: Confirm against ReClass / Cheat Engine on the actual ME binary.
